    supplied = client.post('/charters', json={'name': 'sample-charters-c', 'note': 'note-charters'}).json()
    assert [missing['note'], explicit['note'], supplied['note']] == [None, None, 'note-charters']

import os
import pathlib
import shutil
import subprocess

root = pathlib.Path(__file__).parent
env = {**os.environ, 'PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE': '1'}
command = ['/opt/homebrew/bin/uv', 'run', '--project', '/Users/alvarolorente/workspace/crazy-coding-llm', '--extra', 'test', 'python', '-m', 'pytest', '-q', 'test_generated.py']
def run():
    shutil.rmtree(root / '__pycache__', ignore_errors=True)
    return subprocess.run(command, cwd=root, env=env).returncode
correct = run()
(root / 'solution.py').write_text("from fastapi import FastAPI, Path\n\napp = FastAPI()\n\n@app.get('/rosters/{item_id}')\ndef get_rosters(item_id: int = Path(ge=0)):\n    return {'id': item_id}\n")
primary = run()
(root / 'solution.py').write_text("from fastapi import FastAPI, Path\n\napp = FastAPI()\n\n@app.get('/rosters-changed/{item_id}')\ndef get_rosters(item_id: int = Path(ge=1)):\n    return {'id': item_id}\n")
secondary = run()
raise SystemExit(0 if correct == 0 and primary != 0 and secondary != 0 else 1)

from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

app = FastAPI()

class CreateJournals(BaseModel):

def create_journals(payload: CreateJournals):

")

@app.post('/journals-changed', status_code=201)
def create_journals(payload: CreateJournals):
    return {'id': 1, 'name': payload.name, 'status': 'active', 'note': None}
")

import os
import pathlib
import shutil
import subprocess

root = pathlib.Path(__file__).parent
env = {**os.environ, 'PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE': '1'}
command = ['/opt/homebrew/bin/uv', 'run', '--project', '/Users/alvarolorente/workspace/crazy-coding-llm', '--extra', 'test', 'python', '-m', 'pytest', '-q', 'test_generated.py']
def run():
    shutil.rmtree(root / '__pycache__', ignore_errors=True)
    return subprocess.run(command, cwd=root, env=env).returncode
correct = run()
(root / 'solution.py').write_text("from typing import Literal

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Path
from pydantic import BaseModel

app = FastAPI()
items = {1: {'id': 1, 'status': 'closed'}}

class PatchBundles(BaseModel):
    status: Literal['active', 'closed']

@app.patch('/bundles/{item_id}')
def patch_bundles(payload: PatchBundles, item_id: int = Path(ge=1)):
    if items[item_id]['status'] == 'closed':
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail='bundles state conflict')
    items[item_id]['status'] = payload.status
    return items[item_id]
")
primary = run()
(root / 'solution.py').write_text("from typing import Literal

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Path
from pydantic import BaseModel

app = FastAPI()
items = {1: {'id': 1, 'status': 'closed'}}

class PatchBundles(BaseModel):
    status: Literal['active', 'closed']

@app.patch('/bundles-changed/{item_id}')
def patch_bundles(payload: PatchBundles, item_id: int = Path(ge=1)):
    if items[item_id]['status'] == 'closed':
        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail='bundles state conflict')
    items[item_id]['status'] = payload.status
    return items[item_id]
")
secondary = run()
raise SystemExit(0 if correct == 0 and primary != 0 and secondary != 0 else 1)
